══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Half-Orc — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Half-Orc — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Half-Orc — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 10 damage. Half-Orc — Armored Escapist HP: 49/59
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 20] HIT! 13 damage. Half-Orc — Armored Escapist HP: 36/59
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Half-Orc — Armored Escapist --- HP: 36/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Half-Orc — Armored Escapist --- HP: 36/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 15] FAIL! 3 psychic damage. HP: 175/178
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 175/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Half-Orc — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Half-Orc — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 19 damage. Half-Orc — Armored Escapist HP: 17/59
→ Concentration save: [d20:19+3=22 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 20] HIT! 18 damage. Half-Orc — Armored Escapist HP: -1/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
